title: [FIRRTL] Grand Central Aggregates
body:
The Grand Central pass needs to be updated to support aggregate types that are used in interfaces. 

Implementation-wise, Grand Central needs to generate a more complicated hierarchical reference inside the `traverseField` method and needs to relax the restriction in the `computeField` method to allow the leaf type (that will be used to drive the interface element) to be an aggregate.

This will then result in hierarchical references like:

```verilog
assign foo = bar.baz[42].qux
//              ^ 
//              Everything after here is an aggregate for a vector of a bundle type
```
